title: lathyrus lens
intro: Lathyrus lens, also known as the grass pea or chickling pea, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its high content of proteins, fibers, and other nutrients. The health benefits of Lathyrus lens include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Lathyrus lens can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or supplement, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a food source in some parts of the world.
